what: Present vault type selection to the user
why: Nori supports two vault types: a git-backed vault (cloned from a remote repo) and a local vault (stored in ~/.nori/vaults). The user must choose before filling in type-specific fields.

options.label: Git Repository
options.description: Clone from a remote git repo (GitHub, GitLab, etc.)

options.label: Local Vault
options.description: Create a new vault stored locally in ~/.nori/vaults/

success_handling.criteria: User selects a vault type (git or local)

decisions.reason: Single dialog covers both vault types
decisions.rationale: Rather than two separate registration dialogs, a single flow with a type selector keeps the UX unified and avoids duplicating progress/result steps.
